subcodes.first_line: We have manifested the Cause of God unto all who dwell in the dominions of command and creation, and have made clear His straight path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا اظهرنا امر الله لمن فی ملکوت الامر و الخلق و اوضحنا صراطه المستقیم من
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
